name: Polar Chocolate Delight
recipeIngredient: 2 oz Unsweetened chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. For the base, combine oats, brown sugar, nutmeats, and melted butter in a bowl. Mix until crumbly.
2. Spread the mixture into a shallow baking pan. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Press three-quarters of the mixture into an ungreased 8-inch square baking pan. Set aside the remaining mixture for topping.
4. For the filling, beat butter and sugar until creamy. Blend in the melted chocolate and vanilla. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Spread the filling evenly over the crumb base. Sprinkle with the reserved crumb mixture.
6. Freeze until firm. To serve, cut into pieces.
Source: Our Favorites for family and friends
Reprinted with permission from The Quaker Oats Company
